title: gynoxys fuliginosa
intro: Gynoxys fuliginosa, also known as Black Helenium or Yerba de la Culebra, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gynoxys fuliginosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Gynoxys fuliginosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
